calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Trust'S Title To Real Property (Heggstad Petition)
Off Calendar Feb-09-2016 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Determining Trust'S Title To Real Property (Heggstad Petition)
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Continued To Feb-09-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elliot Myles for (petitioner) David Scott.

The Court stated that there is an issue in that the trust is not signed. Mr. Myles stated that this is a naive family, that they did not like attorneys, created the trust with Nolo Press, that the declaration of trust is sufficient to create a trust, that they may need to change to a petition for probate and that they need to determine if there is a missing page. The Court stated that the name appears to be typed instead of signed, that it is unlikely that there is a missing page and that they may need to amend. The petition for order determining trust's title to real property was continued to February 9, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
